no-assets-info: Dieses Konto verwendet noch keine anderen Assets außer Stellar Lumen.
issuance: Asset {{ asset }} wird von Ihrem Konto ausgegeben. Beim Handel werden neue Token erstellt.

allowed-price-change.helper: If the price changes more than this before signing, the swap will be cancelled.
allowed-price-change.high-warning: High allowed price change may allow a worse rate.
allowed-price-change.label: Allowed price change

empty.add-asset-message: Add another asset before you can swap.

quote.failed: Could not get a price. Try again.
quote.price-changed: Price changed. Review the new amount before swapping.
quote.unavailable: These assets cannot be swapped right now. Try a smaller amount or choose another asset.

validation.destination-asset-unavailable: Choose an asset this account can receive.
validation.invalid-amount: Enter an amount greater than zero.
validation.receiving-capacity-exceeded: Your {{asset}} wallet limit is too low to receive this amount.
